item.northstar.fan_blade.tooltip.summary: Can be installed on large fans.
item.northstar.star_map.tooltip.summary: Contains coordinates and arc of a given _Celestial Body_
item.northstar.star_map.tooltip.conditio: When put in the Rocket Station
Used to combine 3 _Astronomical Readings_ into a _Star Map_
block.northstar.computer_rack.tooltip.su: Can be used to store _Targeting Computers_ to reduce a rocket's _Fuel Cost_
block.northstar.ice_box.tooltip.summary: When cooled to _appropriate Temperature,_ changes the state of matter of given _ingredients._
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.summar: Increases the maximum area of _Oxygen_ _Sealers_ and _Temperature_ _Regulators_. Requires an _Encased_ _Chain_ _Drive_ adjacent to the fan to be powered. Spins passively if no chain is attached and in an oxygenated environment.
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.condit: When R-Clicked with a Fan Blade
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.behavi: Installs the fan blade in the fan.
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.condit: When Wrenched with a chain attached
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.behavi: Changes the side of the chain.
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.condit: When Wrenched with no chain attached
block.northstar.large_fan.tooltip.behavi: Changes the direction when spinning passively.
Removes a fan blade, if none are installed, picks up the block.
Emits _redstone signal_ when block in front is oxygenated.
block.northstar.oxygen_filler.tooltip.su: When pumped with _oxygen,_ fills inserted equipment with _oxygen_.
block.northstar.oxygen_sealer.tooltip.su: When provided with _Oxygen_ from behind and _Kinetic Energy_ from below, oxygenates the _surrounding environment_.
block.northstar.oxygen_sealer.tooltip.be: Toggles the cap making it a full block.
block.northstar.rocket_station.tooltip.b: Opens menu with _Star Map_ slot, which controls Rocket's _Destination_.
block.northstar.telescope.tooltip.summar: Can be used to take _Astronomical Readings_ with paper.
block.northstar.vent.tooltip.behaviour1: Turns into an _insulated vent_. Insulated vents prevent _temperature_ from passing but still let air through.
